text: The purple glow from the meeting room draws me in, urging me to contemplate the artificiality and intention built into spaces designed for collaboration. Moving into the exhibit, the words on the wall seem to echo my own quiet curiosity—the intersection of technology, meaning, and human connection. I feel both displaced and entranced, as if witnessing the future hidden within the present moment. Here, philosophy becomes not just theory but atmosphere, inviting me to reflect not only on what is said but on what is sensed.
